bug_summary: 启动提示中 thinking 相关文案含糊：'to cycle thinking' 缺少 'level'，'to toggle thinking' 应为 'to expand thinking'
fix_summary: 将 cycleThinkingLevel 提示从 'to cycle thinking' 改为 'to cycle thinking level'，toggleThinking 从 'to toggle thinking' 改为 'to expand thinking'
wrong_behavior: 提示显示 'to cycle thinking' 和 'to toggle thinking'，语义模糊
correct_behavior: 提示显示 'to cycle thinking level' 和 'to expand thinking'，准确描述功能

preconditions.what: 交互模式已启动并生成启动快捷键提示

assertions.what: toggleThinking 提示显示 'expand' 而非 'toggle'
